content.text: Build a calculator module with an add function in src/calculator.ts. Follow TDD.

payload.name: apply_patch
payload.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /workspaces/conduct/src/calculator.test.ts
+import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
+
+import { add } from './calculator.js'
+
+describe('calculator', () => {
+  it('adds two numbers', () => {
+    expect(add(2, 3)).toBe(5)
+  })
+})
*** End Patch
